channel.title: Life is Bug, Then debug
channel.description: Recent content on Life is Bug, Then debug

item.title: Start
item.description: 0. “0” of All First of all, I want to know and study quantum information, quantum computing and quantum machine learning, so we won’t pay too much attention to quantum mechanics. However, these three aspects of learning and research actually need the basic concepts of quantum physics, of course, these concepts are very easy to obtain learning materials. For the following content and the following chapters, I want to do some related and preliminary understanding of this direction.

item.title: HUUUUUUUGOOOOOO
item.description: 0 First of all. HUGO is one of the most popular open-source statiic site generators. With its amazing speed and flexibility, Hugo makes building websites fun again. The most amazing thing about Hugo is its simplicity and convenience. Even if you are not a professional web developer, you can easily create your own web page based on Hugo. Of course, it is mainly aimed at engineering people with a certain computer foundation.
This is Yangjie. Yang for Youg, Jie for Jay.
